description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-color-picker` (T3-14) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-color-picker/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, color format typed (hex/rgb/hsl), value typed, presets typed as array
2. Accessibility — labeling for all interactive elements (hue slider, saturation/lightness area, hex input), keyboard operability for all pickers, color preview has accessible description, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all color formats, hex input, preset selection, hx-change event with correct value, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — full picker, swatches only, compact mode
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens for UI chrome (not color output), CSS parts (picker, swatch, input, preview)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable (likely client-side only with clear docs)

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-color-picker/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-color-picker — T3-14 antagonistic quality review
